title: CustomFieldDisplay - Metadata API
description: Represents the view type assigned to product attribute custom fields. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

displayType.description: The view type of the product attribute custom fields. Values are: ColorSwatch Dropdown Pill

fieldApiName.description: The unique name of the product attribute, for example, color_c.

isProtected.description: Optional. An auto-generated value that doesn’t impact the behavior of the metadata type. The default value is false.

masterLabel.description: The primary label for this object.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="CustomFieldDisplay">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="displayType" type="tns:CustomFieldDisplayType"/>
        <xsd:element name="fieldApiName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="CustomFieldDisplayType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Dropdown"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="ColorSwatch"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Pill"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
